title: Keel Toys 19cm Scottish Piper Bear
features: Features: Attention to detail and the unique expressive eyes ensure you simply want to pick up and hug your favourite souvenir toy
Ranges: Ranges include UK, London, Scotland and Welsh Souvenirs
Fabric: Manufactured from luxury acrylic fabrics. The toy is filled with rPet recycled polyester made from plastic waste. Hand washable
Safety: British safety standard BS EN 71 & European safety standard EN71 hand washable
Design: UK Design, Toy authenticated by the iconic Keel Toys FSC card disc
description: From the manufacturer Souvenir With great attention to detail a Keel Toys souvenir is a memorable gift. Gifts from around the UK including London, Scotland and Wales. Designed in the UK by Keel Toys we Love to Hug! Features: Attention to detail and the unique expressive eyes ensure you simply want to pick up and hug your favourite character. Range: Ranges include UK, London, Scotland and Welsh Souvenirs. Fabric: The toy is filled with rPet recycled polyester made from plastic waste. Hand washable. Design & Safety: UK Design, Toy recognised by the iconic Keel Toys FSC card disc. British safety standard BS EN 71 & European safety standard EN71 hand washable.
